top_signals.title: Stocks Pare Drop on Manufacturing, Warsh’s Remarks: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Signs of economic strength alongside easing price pressures spurred a bounce in stocks from session lows, with Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh saying inflation risks have come down.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Software Gains as Guggenheim Says AI No Sector ‘Death Knell’
top_signals.summary: Software shares rose on Wednesday after Guggenheim upgraded a trio of companies, saying fears that artificial intelligence poses a mortal threat to the sector are overdone.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Sugar Touches Highest Since Mid-May as Market Prices in El Niño
top_signals.summary: Raw sugar futures rose to the highest price in more than a month as fears over El Niño prompt traders to cover short positions.
